title: Banned Alive! The Rise and Fall of Italian Cannibal Movies
original_title: Banned Alive! The Rise and Fall of Italian Cannibal Movies
overview: 2 1/2 hour-documentary on the rise and fall of one of the most controversial Italian genres every created. Starting with Deep River Savages arriving to the infamous Cannibal Ferox.
